footer.builtFor: Built for secure payouts, moderation, and campaign analytics.

landing.heroSubtitle: FreeEarnHub is a simple earning platform where users complete verified tasks and businesses run trackable growth campaigns.

howItWorksSteps: Pick a verified task and follow the instructions.
Submit proof and track your status in real time.
Get approved and receive wallet credits quickly.
forBusinessesSteps: Fund your wallet, set budget and reward per task.
Receive moderated submissions with fraud signals.
Track ROI with live analytics and export-ready reports.

live.title: Live Platform Activity
live.subtitle: Anonymized real-time feed. No personal data shown.
live.noLiveWithdraw: No live withdraw requests right now.
live.noActivity: No recent activity yet. New events will appear here.

items.title: Safe payouts
items.body: Every approved task is tracked clearly so users and businesses can trust the money flow.

items.title: Fast campaign launch
items.body: Add funds, publish a campaign, and start getting responses without a complicated setup.

items.title: Clear performance tracking
items.body: See approvals, spending, and campaign results in one place without guessing what is working.

items.title: Real users, real work
items.body: We show only anonymized activity and verified submissions to protect privacy.

items.title: Transparent costs
items.body: Clear commission breakdowns and zero business wallet fees during launch so you know exactly where budgets go.

items.title: Reliable approvals
items.body: Average approval time: {time}. We keep review updates clear so everyone knows what happens next.

cta.title: Ready to start earning?
cta.body: Create an account, complete verified tasks, and grow your earnings with confidence.

offlineInvite.title: Print this QR so anyone can join FreeEarnHub in one scan.
offlineInvite.body: Designed for posters, flyers, business cards, and offline campaigns. The code opens the main home page directly so new users can land on the platform without typing the address.
offlineInvite.qrAlt: QR code linking to the FreeEarnHub homepage

items.title: Learn how to start earning on FreeEarnHub
items.body: Watch the full earning flow before you begin. It explains how to pick tasks, submit proof, and move from review to wallet credit in simple steps.
bullets: See where to find verified tasks and how to choose the right one.
Understand what proof to submit so your work gets approved faster.
Learn how earnings reach your wallet and when withdrawals become available.

items.title: Learn how businesses launch campaigns
items.body: This guide shows the full campaign flow from funding the wallet to creating tasks, getting reviewed submissions, and tracking campaign performance clearly.
bullets: Understand wallet funding, budget setup, and reward planning.
See how submissions are reviewed before results are approved.
Follow how to measure spend, approvals, and campaign health from the dashboard.

testimonials.title: Why people stay with FreeEarnHub
testimonials.subtitle: Clear reviews, simple steps, and visible earnings help both users and businesses trust the platform from day one.

items.quote: The task flow feels easy to understand. I can see what to do, submit proof, and track the result without guessing what happens next.
items.name: Riya S.

items.quote: The campaign side is clean and practical. I can fund the wallet, launch work, and see what is happening without digging through complicated screens.
items.name: Arjun K.

items.quote: The review system feels controlled and transparent. It is easier to trust a platform when the checks, statuses, and history are all visible.
items.name: Nadia R.

about.title: About FreeEarnHub
about.description: FreeEarnHub is a trusted earning platform where businesses launch campaigns and users earn from verified work.

build.title: What We Build
build.body: Businesses create campaigns, users complete the tasks, and we review each submission before rewards are released.

trust.title: How Trust Is Maintained
bullets: Human review before rewards are approved
Clear wallet records for credits, debits, and withdrawals
Fraud and abuse checks before payouts
Recorded decisions for support and dispute handling

direction.title: Our Product Direction
direction.body: FreeEarnHub is built for long-term trust. We focus on clear payouts, useful business results, and simple rules people can understand.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Clear answers about accounts, rewards, withdrawals, campaigns, and platform safety.

items.a: FreeEarnHub is a task platform where businesses launch campaigns and users earn by completing verified tasks.
Rewards are added after the submission is reviewed and approved under the campaign rules.
Most withdrawal requests are processed within 3 to 5 business days, subject to fraud and compliance checks.
Business accounts may require KYC approval before campaign creation and budget deployment.
We do not sell personal data. Data sharing is limited to essential service providers and legal/regulatory obligations.

contact.title: Contact FreeEarnHub
contact.description: Need help with your account, payments, KYC, or campaigns? Contact the FreeEarnHub support team.
contact.supportResponse: Typical first response: 24 to 48 business hours.
contact.hoursNote: Critical payout or security incidents are prioritized.
contact.communityLead: Join our public channels for updates, launch news, and support notices.
contact.socialLead: Follow FreeEarnHub on social platforms for product updates and announcements.

tasks.blocked: You already used your one allowed submission for this campaign.

taskDetail.noVariants: No task detail variants were added for this campaign. Use the task description and link carefully.
taskDetail.assignmentBody: This detail refreshes automatically as slots are taken and released. If unique task details run out before campaign slots are full, the system reuses available details from the same pool.
taskDetail.tutorialTitle: Watch how to complete this task
taskDetail.tutorialBody: Watch this short guide before you submit proof so you follow the task correctly.
taskDetail.statusAllOccupied: All campaign slots are currently occupied.
taskDetail.statusNotAccepting: This campaign is not accepting submissions right now.
taskDetail.onePerUser: This campaign allows only one submission per user.
taskDetail.manyPerUser: This campaign allows multiple submissions per user while slots remain open.
taskDetail.proofWarning: Submit genuine proof only. Invalid or copied proof can be rejected and may trigger fraud review.
taskDetail.proofLinkPlaceholder: Paste the proof URL if this task needs a link
taskDetail.proofDetailsPlaceholder: Add submission details, notes, or text proof
taskDetail.proofImageHelp: Upload a screenshot (jpg/png/webp). Max 500KB. Image will be compressed before upload.
taskDetail.proofImageTooLarge: Screenshot must be under 500KB after compression.
taskDetail.blocked: You have already submitted once for this campaign. Further submissions are disabled by admin.
taskDetail.addProof: Add a proof link or proof text before submitting.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Understand how approvals, levels, fraud checks, and withdrawals work before you submit more tasks.
help.approvalStep1: 1. You submit proof from the task detail page.
help.approvalStep2: 2. Manager reviews first and can approve or reject.
help.approvalStep4: 4. Approved submissions credit your wallet automatically.
help.levelsBullet1: Level upgrades are based on admin-approved submissions.
help.levelsBullet2: L1 starts immediately and higher levels unlock as approvals increase.
help.levelsBullet3: The daily activity counter resets on the configured reset schedule.
help.levelsBullet4: Your overview page shows current progress toward the next level.
help.fraudTitle: What can get a submission rejected
help.fraudBullet2: Submitting for a task without completing the required action.
help.fraudBullet3: Repeated abuse from the same device or IP.
help.fraudBullet4: Trying to bypass campaign slot or review controls.
help.withdrawalsBullet2: Emergency withdrawal is allowed below the minimum, up to 2 times per month.
help.withdrawalsBullet3: Only one pending withdrawal request is allowed at a time.
help.withdrawalsBullet4: Admin review determines approval or rejection.
help.supportBody: If something looks wrong in your submissions, wallet, or withdrawals, use the public contact page or the official support channel listed there.

hero.title: Add funds using QR, UPI, or phone payment
hero.description: We are using a manual payment review flow for now. Pay using the details below, upload the receipt, and our team will credit the wallet after verification.

notConfigured.title: Manual funding is not configured yet
notConfigured.body: Add the funding UPI ID or phone number in the environment first, then this payment flow will be available for businesses.

ownerOnlyBanner.title: Billing actions are limited to the business owner
ownerOnlyBanner.body: You can review the funding history here, but only the business owner can submit a new wallet funding request.

pricing.title: Business wallet fee structure
pricing.description: Top-ups stay free during launch. Refunds use the reviewed refund fee so the rules stay clear before you submit any wallet movement.
pricing.addFundFeeHelp: Applied on wallet top-ups. Currently waived during launch.
pricing.refundFeeHelp: Applied only when a refund request is approved after review.
pricing.usageBody1: Use add-fund when you want to increase campaign budget quickly with QR or UPI payment.
pricing.usageBody2: Use refund when you want approved unused wallet balance moved back out after admin review.
pricing.usageNote: The funding and refund cards below follow the same pricing model shown here.

steps.title: Complete payment in 5 clear steps
steps.item1: Enter the amount you want to add.
steps.item2: Generate payment details to create a unique reference ID.
steps.item3: Pay using the QR code, UPI ID, or phone number and add the reference ID in the note.
steps.item4: Upload the payment screenshot and add UTR if available.
steps.item5: Click verify, then send the receipt on WhatsApp for faster review.

details.scanHelpBefore: Pay the exact amount and add
details.qrPending: QR code will appear after payment details are generated.
details.tip: Keep the screenshot clear and readable. If possible, write the reference ID in the note so our review team can approve it faster.

verification.title: Upload screenshot and send for approval
verification.description: After payment, upload the screenshot here. We review each request manually before the wallet is credited.
verification.utrPlaceholder: Add the UTR if your payment app shows it
verification.uploadHelp: One screenshot only. JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Max 500 KB after compression.

whatsapp.title: Funding request sent for review
whatsapp.description: Send the receipt on WhatsApp for faster manual verification.

refund.descriptionBefore: Refund requests use the business refund fee setting. Right now the refund fee is

cards.refundFeeHelp: Applied after admin approval of the refund request.
cards.refundPolicyHelp: Request only from currently refundable wallet balance. The net amount preview stays visible before you submit.

benefits.title: What this unlocks
benefits.body: Once connected, admin broadcasts and important workflow events can be delivered through in-app, email, SMS, push, and Telegram without changing your core moderation or payout logic.
